title: Last Day Where You Can Still Cross
titleCn: 你能穿过矩阵的最后一天

testcases.input: row = 2, col = 2, cells = [[1,1],[2,1],[1,2],[2,2]] Output: 2 Explanation: The above image depicts how the matrix changes each day starting from day 0. The last day where it is possible to cross from top to bottom is on day 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The above image depicts how the matrix changes each day starting from day 0. The last day where it is possible to cross from top to bottom is on day 2.

testcases.input: row = 2, col = 2, cells = [[1,1],[1,2],[2,1],[2,2]] Output: 1 Explanation: The above image depicts how the matrix changes each day starting from day 0. The last day where it is possible to cross from top to bottom is on day 1.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: The above image depicts how the matrix changes each day starting from day 0. The last day where it is possible to cross from top to bottom is on day 1.
